headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Reaffirms Overweight Rating for Applied Materials (AMAT)
summary: Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the 10 best AI chip stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 30, Cantor Fitzgerald raised the price target on Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) from $470 to $500. The firm reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares, which now offer an adjusted upside potential of more […]
